verses.1: A Psalm of David. LORD, who shall abide in thy tabernacle? who shall dwell in thy holy hill?
verses.2: He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh the truth in his heart.
verses.3: He that backbiteth not with his tongue, nor doeth evil to his neighbor, nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbor.
verses.4: In whose eyes a vile person is contemned; but he honoreth them that fear the LORD. He that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not.
verses.5: He that putteth not out his money to usury, nor taketh reward against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
